prompt: Tap left hole card (As) for blocker-risk input.
why_v1: Hole-card anchor keeps hand reference stable before ICM action.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. As is the hole-card anchor, so the tournament read stays tied to the blocker cue that changes how much pressure your hand can carry.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Tap the ace of spades because that blocker matters to the ICM read: strong continue hands are partly removed, which can change how credible your pressure is.
